meta.title: Frequently asked questions
meta.description: Answers to common questions about Jobbliggaren: pricing, where the ads come from, matching, CV and how your data is handled.

title: Frequently asked questions
intro: Here are answers to what we are asked most often. If you cannot find your answer, you can contact us.

pris.a: Jobbliggaren is free to use. There are no fees and no paywall.

kalla.q: Where do the job ads come from?
kalla.a: The ads are sourced from the Swedish Public Employment Service's Platsbanken via open data. You search the same active ads found there.

matchning.a: Matching compares your profile with the requirements in an ad and shows which requirements match and which are missing. There is no hidden score.

ai.q: Do you use AI to read my CV?
ai.a: No. Jobbliggaren uses no AI. Review and matching are rule-based, and your CV is never sent to an external AI service.

konto.a: You need an account to search for jobs, save searches and upload a CV. Registration is open and free of charge.

uppgifter.q: How is my personal data protected?
uppgifter.a: Your data is stored within the EU and sensitive fields are encrypted. We use only necessary cookies and no tracking cookies.

cv.a: Yes. You can upload a CV in PDF or Word. Jobbliggaren can review it and suggest improvements that you choose whether to apply.

radera.q: How do I delete my data?
radera.a: You can ask us to delete your data at any time. Contact us and we will remove it.
